project_types.display_name: Web full-stack (Node.js HTTP nativo + frontend HTML)

completed_steps.summary: No prior README/CONTRIBUTING/architecture docs in repo. Found 3 .docx/.pptx companion files in root (out-of-band material)
Tech stack: Node.js core http (zero deps) + Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 (optional) + HTML/CSS/JS vanilla
22 API endpoints documented; users.json data model + 4 config files + audit JSONL captured; 5 UI pages + 7 backend tools inventoried
Source tree annotated with 8 top-level dirs and roles in pipeline
Dev/operations guide written (no CI/CD or deployment config found)
Single-part project, no integration architecture needed
Architecture document covering pattern (3-stage pipeline), tech stack, data, API, security, deployment, testing, trade-offs
Supporting docs written: project-overview, component-inventory, development-guide
Validation pass against checklist; no incomplete markers

findings.project_classification: Monolith Node.js full-stack — server HTTP nativo (zero deps), agenti AI (conversational/planner/orchestrator), tools per IAM, config JSON, mock data anonimizzati, frontend HTML statico in public/. Dominio: copilota operativo per Identity & Access Management (DL IAM). Dataset anonimizzato — app: ERPCORE/ORDERHUB/AUTHFORMS/NETOPS/NETMON/WORKFLOW/QUALITY/JOBORDER/WEBPORTAL; domini: @demo.local, @external.demo
findings.tech_stack: Node.js >= 18 (http core, zero npm deps), Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 via fetch (DEMO fallback con pattern matching locale), JSON files come storage, JSONL append-only audit, HTML/CSS/JS vanilla
findings.data: users.json (users[], signInLogs{}, conditionalAccessPolicies[], NHI[], openTickets[], slaMetrics{}); 4 config files; audit.jsonl

resume_instructions: Workflow complete. To re-scan run /bmad-document-project again.
